findings.title: Spring Boot version unknown
findings.recommendation: Declare Spring Boot version explicitly in Maven or Gradle metadata.

findings.title: javax namespace usage detected
findings.recommendation: Migrate Java EE imports to Jakarta equivalents for Spring Boot 3.
